ddls:
CREATE TABLE "homeless_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "coc_number" TEXT /* CoC number */,
  "coc_name" TEXT /* CoC name */,
  "measure" TEXT /* Measure of homelessness (e.g., Sheltered Homeless, Total Homeless, Unsheltered Homeless) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of homeless individuals for the given measure */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the homeless individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the homeless individuals */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the homeless individuals */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the homeless individuals */,
  "veteran_status" INTEGER /* Whether the individual is a veteran */,
  "chronic_homelessness" INTEGER /* Whether the individual is chronically homeless */,
  "disability" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has a disability */,
  "sub_population" TEXT /* Sub-population category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homeless_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homeless_data_coc_number FOREIGN KEY ("coc_number") REFERENCES coc ("coc_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homeless_data_measure FOREIGN KEY ("measure") REFERENCES measures ("measure_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homeless_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homeless_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., AK, CA, TX) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coc" (
  "coc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CoC */,
  "coc_number" TEXT /* CoC number */,
  "coc_name" TEXT /* CoC name */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the CoC is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the CoC area */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the CoC in square kilometers */,
  "number_of_shelters" INTEGER /* Number of shelters in the CoC */,
  "number_of_homeless_services" INTEGER /* Number of homeless services provided in the CoC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coc_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "is_aggregate" INTEGER /* Whether the measure is an aggregate measure */,
  "sub_measures" TEXT /* Sub-measures included in the aggregate measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Whether the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES homeless_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the exported file on the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES homeless_data ("data_id")
)
